# Validation scores

<!-- Generated by `npm run docs:sync`. Do not hand-edit ÔÇö edit tools/docs-sync.ts or tools/generator.ts (case descriptions) instead. -->

To generate suite metrics, run `npm run score:suite` then `npm run docs:sync`. **How scores are computed:** [SCORING.md](./SCORING.md).

## Summary

| Metric | Standard (21) | Edge (23) | All (44) |
|--------|---------------|-----------|----------|
| XML schema pass | 21 / 21 | 23 / 23 | **44 / 44** |
| Avg **visual (layout-based)** | 96.55% | 96.20% | **96.37%** |
| Avg raw layout (pre-guards) | 96.55% | 96.35% | **96.44%** |
| Avg pixel match (tripwire, unscored) | 88.80% | 93.34% | **91.17%** |
| Avg engine score | 93.59 | 95.01 | **94.33** |
| Avg compile | ÔÇö | ÔÇö | **50.7 ms** |
| Identity-pair calibration (full 10) | ÔÇö | ÔÇö | **mean 97.21% / min 96.42%** |

Tables below use the **layout-based visual** score; misaligned px is the raw pixel tripwire.

---

## Standard baseline (21)

| Test | Description | XML | Visual | Misaligned px |
|------|-------------|-----|--------|---------------|
| `plain-paragraph` | Single unstyled `<p>` | Ôťô | 96.84% | 1,360 |
| `multiple-paragraphs` | Three sequential paragraphs | Ôťô | 97.31% | 2,741 |
| `heading-hierarchy` | h1 / h2 / h3 with body text | Ôťô | 91.56% | 5,900 |
| `simple-unordered-list` | Basic `<ul>` with 3 items | Ôťô | 97.27% | 739 |
| `simple-ordered-list` | Basic `<ol>` with 3 items | Ôťô | 97.24% | 1,582 |
| `ordered-list-rich-inline` | `<ol>` with `<strong>` + highlighted `<span>` per item | Ôťô | 93.75% | 3,634 |
| `paragraph-and-list` | Intro paragraph + `<ul>` | Ôťô | 97.01% | 1,239 |
| `simple-link` | One hyperlinked anchor | Ôťô | 96.49% | 1,218 |
| `multiple-links` | Two links in one sentence | Ôťô | 96.59% | 1,278 |
| `basic-inline-formatting` | `<strong>`, `<em>`, nested bold-italic | Ôťô | 97.24% | 1,425 |
| `pre-code-block` | Fenced `<pre><code>` + inline `<code>` | Ôťô | 97.16% | 4,240 |
| `simple-table-2x2` | 2-column table, header + one row | Ôťô | 96.98% | 589 |
| `simple-table-3col` | 3-column table, 3 rows | Ôťô | 97.46% | 1,038 |
| `adjacent-tables` | Two sibling tables with nothing between them ÔÇö must not merge into one | Ôťô | 96.94% | 2,159 |
| `table-colgroup-widths` | Column widths from `<colgroup>` (wide first column, short cells) + a colspan section row | Ôťô | 97.59% | 2,239 |
| `css-length-units` | Physical CSS length units (mm, cm, in, pc) ÔÇö indents/padding at real distances | Ôťô | 97.00% | 3,270 |
| `paragraph-with-line-break` | Address block with `<br>` tags | Ôťô | 96.29% | 2,105 |
| `admonition-note` | Docs `note` admonition ÔÇö box synthesized from class (browser styling via CSS) | Ôťô | 97.97% | 5,182 |
| `simple-blockquote` | Plain blockquote + paragraph | Ôťô | 97.44% | 1,126 |
| `centered-paragraph` | `text-align: center` | Ôťô | 96.81% | 748 |
| `horizontal-rule` | Content separated by `<hr>` | Ôťô | 94.64% | 2,480 |

## Edge cases (23)

| Test | Description | XML | Visual | Misaligned px |
|------|-------------|-----|--------|---------------|
| `typography-colors` | Foreground/background colors, mixed inline & block | Ôťô | 90.35% | 4,706 |
| `table-mismatched-cells` | Colspan, short rows, extra cells | Ôťô | 97.34% | 1,347 |
| `borderless-table` | Label/value table with `border:none` | Ôťô | 91.55% | 2,467 |
| `table-row-backgrounds` | Shaded `<tr>` bands | Ôťô | 98.73% | 1,764 |
| `table-cell-padding` | Per-cell CSS `padding` overrides the table `cellpadding` (browser-native, scorable) | Ôťô | 97.15% | 1,044 |
| `nested-blockquotes-lists` | Nested quotes, `<ol>` inside `<ul>` | Ôťô | 91.48% | 3,666 |
| `inline-vs-block` | Spans, links, code, styled divs | Ôťô | 98.35% | 3,691 |
| `inline-backgrounds` | Multi-color inline highlights, bold in shaded span | Ôťô | 97.77% | 2,988 |
| `mixed-margins-paddings` | Asymmetric margin/padding, bordered box | Ôťô | 95.68% | 5,443 |
| `flex-row-horizontal` | `display:flex; flex-direction:row` ÔÇö three columns with gap and wrapping content | Ôťô | 97.28% | 16,655 |
| `flex-column-vertical` | `display:flex; flex-direction:column` ÔÇö stacked rows with gap | Ôťô | 98.19% | 12,759 |
| `flex-row-images` | Flex row of bordered cards each wrapping an `<img>` (LibreOffice overflow repro; no rasterize) | Ôťô | 93.73% | 31,751 |
| `inline-svg-chart` | Inline SVG bar chart Ôćĺ native DOCX bands | Ôťô | 97.03% | 2,907 |
| `rasterize-in-place-chart` | Complex SVG + canvas rasterized via `rasterizeInPlace` before conversion | Ôťô | 99.20% | 3,276 |
| `table-cell-bar-divs` | CSS bar divs inside table cells | Ôťô | 98.74% | 5,862 |
| `unicode-emoji-content` | Emoji in body text | Ôťô | 95.05% | 3,619 |
| `image-block` | `data:` URL `<img>` in a centered paragraph | Ôťô | 98.75% | 1,410 |
| `image-figure` | `<figure>` Ôćĺ `<img>` + `<figcaption>` | Ôťô | 99.33% | 809 |
| `tooltip-skipped` | Heading permalink tooltip (`role=tooltip`) is skipped, not rendered as text | Ôťô | 90.48% | 3,397 |
| `modal-dialog-skipped` | Figure with a click-to-expand `<dialog>` holding a duplicate image ÔÇö modal is skipped | Ôťô | 95.15% | 2,064 |
| `ordered-list-lower-alpha` | `<ol list-style-type:lower-alpha>` | Ôťô | 97.30% | 1,933 |
| `ordered-list-upper-roman` | `<ol list-style-type:upper-roman>` | Ôťô | 97.12% | 1,106 |
| `unordered-list-square` | `<ul list-style-type:square>` | Ôťô | 96.89% | 1,657 |

| `typography-colors` | 90.35% | 1 | Foreground/background colors, mixed inline & block |

| `nested-blockquotes-lists` | 91.48% | 1 |  |

| `flex-row-images` | 93.73% | 1 | Flex row of bordered cards each wrapping an `<img>` (LibreOffice overflow repro; no rasterize) |
| `ordered-list-rich-inline` | 93.75% | 1 | `<ol>` with `<strong>` + highlighted `<span>` per item |
| `horizontal-rule` | 94.64% | 1 | Minor vertical height issues |

## Related

- **OSS comparison** ÔÇö run `npm run score:benchmark` after a loop; see [BENCHMARK.md](./BENCHMARK.md)
